title: Why Motion Design is the Future of Brand Communication
summary: In an era of shrinking attention spans, motion design has become the most powerful tool for brand storytelling. Here’s why every brand needs to invest in motion.
content:
In an era where the average attention span has dropped to just 8.25 seconds, static designs are no longer enough. Brands need motion — and they need it now.
The Rise of Motion Design Over the past five years, I’ve watched motion design transform from a “nice-to-have” to an absolute …

title: From Animator to Tech: My Journey into Interactive Technology
summary: How I transitioned from traditional animation to interactive technology and why I believe the two fields are converging faster than ever.
content:
Two years ago, I was a full-time animator at Unacademy. Today, I’m bridging the gap between animation and interactive technology at ET Money. Here’s how that happened.
The Pivot Point It started with a simple observation: the best animations I was creating were going into static video …

title: 5 Blender Tips That Changed My 3D Workflow
summary: After years of working with Blender for 3D animation, these five tips completely transformed my productivity and output quality.
content:
Blender is incredible — and free! But it has a steep learning curve. After 3+ years of daily use, here are the five tips that made the biggest difference in my work.
1. Master Geometry Nodes Geometry Nodes aren’t just for procedural modeling. I use them for:
